channel.title: Awesome Mac - 最近新增应用
channel.description: 根据中文列表整理的最近新增 macOS 应用。

item.title: Ferdium
item.description: Category: 通信 App: Ferdium Description: 将多个 Web 应用整合到一起的消息工作区。 Website: https://ferdium.org/ Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/de8e8cc05fe1d5868f23afa350f93eea843685e8
item.content:encoded:
Category: 通信
App: Ferdium
Description: 将多个 Web 应用整合到一起的消息工作区。
Website: https://ferdium.org/
Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/de8e8cc05fe1d5868f23afa350f93eea843685e8

item.title: Dropshare
item.description: Category: 通信 / 文件共享 App: Dropshare Description: 用于分享截图、录屏和其他文件的工具。 Website: https://dropshare.app Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/de8e8cc05fe1d5868f23afa350f93eea843685e8
item.content:encoded:
Category: 通信 / 文件共享
App: Dropshare
Description: 用于分享截图、录屏和其他文件的工具。
Website: https://dropshare.app
Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/de8e8cc05fe1d5868f23afa350f93eea843685e8

item.title: LyricGlow
item.description: Category: 音频和视频 App: LyricGlow Description: 支持逐词发光效果的同步歌词播放器。 Open Source: https://github.com/ateymoori/lyricglow Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/de8e8cc05fe1d5868f23afa350f93eea843685e8
item.content:encoded:
Category: 音频和视频
App: LyricGlow
Description: 支持逐词发光效果的同步歌词播放器。
Open Source: https://github.com/ateymoori/lyricglow
Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/de8e8cc05fe1d5868f23afa350f93eea843685e8

item.title: trax
item.description: Category: 音频和视频 App: trax Description: 支持音频转换和标签编辑的音乐资料库管理工具。 Open Source: https://github.com/nbonamy/trax Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/de8e8cc05fe1d5868f23afa350f93eea843685e8
item.content:encoded:
Category: 音频和视频
App: trax
Description: 支持音频转换和标签编辑的音乐资料库管理工具。
Open Source: https://github.com/nbonamy/trax
Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/de8e8cc05fe1d5868f23afa350f93eea843685e8

item.title: Tuneful
item.description: Category: 音频和视频 App: Tuneful Description: 用于从菜单栏或迷你播放器控制 Spotify 和 Apple Music 的工具。 Website: https://www.tuneful.dev Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/de8e8cc05fe1d5868f23afa350f93eea843685e8
item.content:encoded:
Category: 音频和视频
App: Tuneful
Description: 用于从菜单栏或迷你播放器控制 Spotify 和 Apple Music 的工具。
Website: https://www.tuneful.dev
Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/de8e8cc05fe1d5868f23afa350f93eea843685e8

item.title: YouTube Music
item.description: Category: 音频和视频 App: YouTube Music Description: 支持插件扩展的 YouTube Music 桌面播放器。 Website: https://th-ch.github.io/youtube-music/ Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/de8e8cc05fe1d5868f23afa350f93eea843685e8
item.content:encoded:
Category: 音频和视频
App: YouTube Music
Description: 支持插件扩展的 YouTube Music 桌面播放器。
Website: https://th-ch.github.io/youtube-music/
Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/de8e8cc05fe1d5868f23afa350f93eea843685e8

item.title: swiftGuard
item.description: Category: 安全工具 App: swiftGuard Description: 用于保护 USB 端口免受未授权访问的工具。 Open Source: https://github.com/Lennolium/swiftGuard Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/de8e8cc05fe1d5868f23afa350f93eea843685e8

item.title: DB Pro
item.category: 开发者工具 / 数据库
item.description: Category: 开发者工具 / 数据库 App: DB Pro Description: 用于查询和管理 SQL 数据库的客户端。 Website: https://dbpro.app Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c
item.content:encoded:
Category: 开发者工具 / 数据库
App: DB Pro
Description: 用于查询和管理 SQL 数据库的客户端。
Website: https://dbpro.app
Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c

item.title: TrailBase
item.category: 开发者工具 / 数据库
item.description: Category: 开发者工具 / 数据库 App: TrailBase Description: 基于 SQLite 的开源后端平台，提供类型安全 API、认证和管理工具。 Website: https://trailbase.io Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c
item.content:encoded:
Category: 开发者工具 / 数据库
App: TrailBase
Description: 基于 SQLite 的开源后端平台，提供类型安全 API、认证和管理工具。
Website: https://trailbase.io
Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c

item.title: Lunacy

item.description: Category: 设计和产品 / 设计工具 App: Lunacy Description: 内置素材并支持实时协作的矢量设计工具。 Website: https://icons8.com/lunacy Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c

item.title: Screenpipe

item.description: Category: 设计和产品 / 屏幕录制 App: Screenpipe Description: 支持 AI 搜索的本地屏幕与麦克风录制工具。 Open Source: https://github.com/mediar-ai/screenpipe Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c

Website: https://wavebox.io

Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c

item.title: Revu
item.category: 阅读与写作工具 / 笔记
item.description: Category: 阅读与写作工具 / 笔记 App: Revu Description: 本地优先的间隔重复学习应用，支持 FSRS 排程和 Anki 导入。 Website: https://revu.cards/ Commit: Add Revu to the ja/ko/zh list. #1955 Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/11a0d97fb3707c4b5487e3b9618141cfdc20abb4
item.content:encoded:
Category: 阅读与写作工具 / 笔记
App: Revu
Description: 本地优先的间隔重复学习应用，支持 FSRS 排程和 Anki 导入。
Website: https://revu.cards/
Commit: Add Revu to the ja/ko/zh list. #1955
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/11a0d97fb3707c4b5487e3b9618141cfdc20abb4
